name: Hide Yellow Monster Survivor
description: In Hide Yellow Monster Survivor the players objective is to evade the multicolored monster and avoid capture. The game challenges you to gather various items and return them to the safe haven before time runs out. Website Developer <a href='https://es.kizi10.org'>https://es.kizi10.org</a>
instructions: WASD walk SPACE jump TAB menu
tags: Action, Baby, Baby Games, Collecting, Mentolatux, run, Skill, Unity3D, WebGL
